headline: Smurfit Westrock Announces Intention to Delist from the LSE
summary: DUBLIN, May 20, 2026--Smurfit Westrock, today announces its intention to delist from the London Stock Exchange (the "LSE") (the "LSE Delisting"). Once the LSE Delisting takes effect, the Company will be solely listed on the New York Stock Exchange.
